name: Rosette Floral Midi Frock
description: Brighten your wardrobe with this elegant yellow floral midi dress designed for effortless daytime charm. Featuring a soft V-neckline, puff sleeves, and a flowy tiered silhouette, this dress offers both comfort and feminine grace. The lightweight fabric drapes beautifully, making it perfect for brunch dates, vacations, or summer outings.

name: Elara Chiffon Tiered Frock
description: A dreamy blend of elegance and comfort, this lavender floral midi dress adds a soft romantic touch to your everyday style. Designed with a flattering empire waist and airy silhouette, it creates a graceful flow while ensuring all-day comfort.

name: Lyra Pastel Smocked Frock
description: Fresh and effortlessly stylish, this sky-blue floral dress brings a cool and calming vibe to your wardrobe. The flowy structure and soft fabric make it ideal for warm-weather styling while maintaining a chic and modern look.

name: Navy Blue Embroidered Anarkali Dress
description: Step into timeless elegance with this navy blue embroidered Anarkali dress. Featuring intricate golden embroidery on the bodice and a beautifully pleated skirt, this outfit blends traditional craftsmanship with modern sophistication. Paired with a matching dupatta, it creates a regal festive look.

name: Celeste Flare Sleeve Frock
description: Add a playful pop of color to your collection with this pink floral midi dress. Designed with a flattering gathered waist and soft puff sleeves, it offers a youthful and feminine appeal while keeping comfort a priority.

name: Red & Green Festive Anarkali Set
description: Celebrate in style with this stunning red Anarkali paired with a rich green Bandhani-inspired dupatta. The dress features delicate golden detailing on the neckline and pleated flare that adds graceful movement. The contrasting dupatta with intricate traditional patterns enhances its festive appeal.

name: Peach & Pink Floral Anarkali Set
description: Soft, feminine, and elegant — this peach Anarkali with bold pink floral prints creates a dreamy ethnic look. The embroidered neckline and flowy gathered silhouette make it both flattering and comfortable. Paired with a matching dupatta for a complete ensemble.

name: Mustard Multi-Print Anarkali Set
description: Vibrant and full of life, this mustard Anarkali showcases a mix of traditional and floral prints for a contemporary ethnic vibe. The colorful patterns and soft flare create a lively festive outfit that stands out effortlessly.

name: Hot Pink Floral Anarkali Set
description: Turn heads with this striking hot pink Anarkali featuring delicate floral patterns and subtle embellishments. The flowy structure and matching dupatta give it a graceful yet bold festive charm.

name: Emerald Green & Maroon Festive Anarkali
description: A royal blend of emerald green Anarkali paired with a maroon printed dupatta. The gold neckline detailing and pleated silhouette give this outfit a timeless ethnic elegance. A perfect balance of tradition and sophistication.

name: Royal Purple & Pink Festive Anarkali
description: Elegant and regal, this royal purple Anarkali is paired with a vibrant pink printed dupatta. Featuring subtle gold embellishments and graceful pleats, this ensemble is designed to make a statement at any celebration.

name: Mustard Yellow Embellished Anarkali
description: Bright and festive, this mustard yellow Anarkali features delicate embellishments along the neckline and a beautifully gathered flare. A cheerful yet elegant outfit for special occasions.

name: Pastel Yellow & Mint Printed Anarkali
description: Graceful and refreshing, this pastel Anarkali blends soft yellow and mint tones with subtle prints. The lightweight flowy fabric ensures comfort while maintaining a sophisticated festive look.

name: Black & White Printed Anarkali Set
description: Classic and timeless, this black Anarkali features white ethnic prints with a flattering V-neck design. The airy silhouette offers comfort with understated elegance, making it a versatile addition to your wardrobe.

name: Deep Pink Floral Anarkali Set
description: Rich, bold, and feminine — this deep pink floral Anarkali exudes festive charm. The embroidered neckline and flowing silhouette create a graceful and flattering ethnic ensemble.

name: Aurora Ruffled Peasant Frock
description: Float effortlessly in this dreamy aqua blue butterfly maxi dress. Designed with soft pleated layers and a flowy silhouette, this statement piece features delicate butterfly prints over a white base with a coordinated inner lining. The lightweight sheer overlay and voluminous flare create a graceful, fairy-like movement with every step.

name: Dahlia Printed Cotton Frock
description: A striking blend of elegance and charm, this teal butterfly maxi dress is crafted with soft pleats that add beautiful volume. The deep teal butterfly prints enhance the crisp white base, creating a refreshing yet bold look. A flattering waist tie cinches the silhouette for added grace.

name: Seraphina Lace-Trim Frock
description: Understated yet stunning, this grey butterfly maxi dress offers a sophisticated twist to playful prints. The monochrome butterfly design combined with soft cascading pleats gives it a chic, contemporary vibe.

name: Willow Boho Maxi Frock
description: Romantic and graceful, this lavender butterfly maxi dress radiates soft elegance. The delicate purple butterfly prints paired with a voluminous pleated skirt create a dreamy silhouette that flows beautifully with movement.

name: Violet Puff-Sleeve Frock
description: Playful yet elegant, this pink butterfly maxi dress is designed to make a statement. Featuring vibrant pink butterfly prints over a soft white base, the tiered pleats and flowing structure create a charming and feminine look.

name: Primrose A-Line Sundress Frock
description: Soft, elegant, and effortlessly graceful, this pastel peach maxi dress features delicate floral prints combined with beautifully layered pleats. The structured bodice with a collared neckline blends modern charm with feminine flow, making it perfect for sophisticated daytime styling.

name: Magnolia Embroidered Frock
description: Bright and lively, this coral pink maxi dress showcases intricate floral patterns paired with soft pleated layers for added volume and movement. Designed to enhance elegance while keeping comfort intact, it's a statement piece for festive daytime wear.

name: Clover Broderie Anglaise Frock
description: A refreshing blend of colors and prints, this lavender maxi dress offers a unique artistic appeal. The floral motifs combined with tiered pleats create a dreamy silhouette that flows beautifully with every step.

name: Iris Balloon Hem Frock
description: Bold yet graceful, this sunset pink maxi dress features vibrant floral patterns and layered pleats that add dramatic movement. The structured top and flowing skirt create a balanced silhouette that feels both stylish and comfortable.

name: Maharani Bridal Embroidered Lehenga
description: A vibrant celebration of art and culture, this mustard yellow lehenga features playful jungle-inspired prints with elephants, giraffes, and wildlife motifs. Paired with a contrasting aqua dupatta detailed with intricate animal borders, this ensemble creates a bold yet graceful festive look.

name: Zulekha Zardozi Grand Lehenga
description: Soft lavender tones meet artistic jungle motifs in this elegant lehenga set. The pleated skirt flows beautifully, while the olive green dupatta with detailed animal borders adds depth and richness to the ensemble.

name: Anaya Mirror-Worked Bridal Lehenga
description: Fresh and contemporary, this aqua blue lehenga features whimsical jungle-inspired prints and soft pleats for graceful movement. The blush pink dupatta with ornate printed borders adds a romantic, festive touch.

name: Kanwal Ombre Silk Lehenga
description: A modern twist on traditional wear, this mustard pleated lehenga is paired with a printed lavender jacket for a layered, statement look. The jungle-themed prints create a bold and artistic festive outfit.

name: Nusrat Cut-Dana Festive Lehenga
description: Rich and dramatic, this deep wine lehenga features intricate wildlife prints along the hemline. Paired with a matching printed jacket, this set offers regal sophistication with a modern ethnic twist.

name: Huma Threadwork Couture Lehenga
description: Chic and refreshing, this mint green lehenga features delicate jungle motifs and soft pleats that enhance its flow. The matching printed jacket adds structure and a contemporary vibe to this festive-ready look.

name: Sunshine Yellow & Teal Ombre Gown
description: Bright, cheerful, and effortlessly graceful, this sunshine yellow gown transitions beautifully into a deep teal ombre hem. The embellished bodice paired with soft pleats creates a refreshing festive look perfect for daytime celebrations.

name: Blush Pink to Crimson Ombre Gown
description: Romantic and feminine, this blush pink gown gradually deepens into a rich crimson hem, creating a dreamy gradient effect. The delicate embroidered motifs on the bodice enhance its soft and graceful aesthetic.

name: Scarlet Red & Deep Teal Ombre Gown
description: A stunning fusion of bold colors, this scarlet red gown blends seamlessly into a deep teal hem for a sophisticated festive look. The intricately embellished bodice adds richness while the voluminous skirt ensures graceful movement.

name: Red & Black Ombre Festive Gown
description: Bold and elegant, this red-to-black ombre gown is designed to make a striking statement. Featuring a structured bodice with delicate embellishments and soft puff sleeves, the flowing pleated skirt adds dramatic movement and grace to every step.

name: Aiza Sequined Bridal Lehenga
description: Soft, graceful, and timeless — this peach blush lehenga set radiates effortless elegance. The delicately embroidered blouse paired with a flowing pleated skirt creates a balanced festive silhouette. The matching dupatta with intricate lace borders adds refined charm to the overall look.

name: Nadia Gota Patti Wedding Lehenga
description: Rich and regal, this deep wine lehenga set is crafted for statement occasions. The intricately embroidered blouse and delicate scattered motifs across the skirt elevate its royal appeal, while the lace-edged dupatta completes the ensemble with sophistication.

name: Rida Banarasi Brocade Lehenga
description: Dreamy and refined, this lavender mauve lehenga blends soft pastel tones with elegant embroidery. The shimmering silk texture enhances its festive glow, while the embroidered dupatta border adds graceful detailing.

name: Saba Velvet Embroidered Lehenga
description: Subtle yet striking, this olive green silk lehenga set exudes understated luxury. The embroidered blouse with tie-back detail and delicately embellished skirt create a modern yet traditional festive outfit. The rich dupatta with heavy border detailing enhances its royal charm.

name: Aqua Blossom Grace Anarkali Suit
description: Elegant aqua blue floral anarkali suit set designed with soft flowy fabric and pastel flower prints. Comes with matching dupatta and pant, perfect for festive day functions and celebrations.

name: Royal Violet Dream Party Gown
description: Beautiful violet shaded party gown featuring a dreamy gradient flare and lightweight comfort. Ideal for receptions, birthdays and evening parties.

name: Mauve Princess Charm Anarkali Frock
description: Graceful mauve anarkali frock crafted with rich texture and royal simplicity. A perfect choice for traditional occasions and family gatherings.

name: Midnight Pink Bloom Designer Gown
description: Stylish black designer gown enhanced with vibrant pink floral prints. Gives a bold modern ethnic fusion look for party wear styling.

name: Mint Fairy Elegance Anarkali Suit
description: Soft mint green anarkali suit with delicate nature inspired prints and flowy silhouette. Creates a fresh and elegant festive appearance.

name: Crimson Garden Queen Festive Gown
description: Rich red floral festive gown with grand flare and full sleeve styling. A royal outfit choice for weddings, sangeet and special celebrations.

name: Briar Polka-Dot Frock
description: Classy turquoise designer frock with premium fall and minimal embellishment. Perfect for simple festive styling with a sophisticated touch.

name: Ivory Moonlight Classic Anarkali Suit
description: Timeless white anarkali suit highlighted with subtle black detailing. Suitable for receptions, poojas and cultural functions.

name: Black Swan Party Wear Gown
description: Elegant black party wear gown featuring soft layered flare and stylish waist pattern. Gives a chic and graceful modern ethnic look.

name: Sunshine Floral Delight Anarkali Suit
description: Bright mustard floral anarkali suit with colourful flower prints adding cheerful festive energy. Ideal for haldi and daytime celebrations.

name: Zinnia Swiss-Dot Frock
description: Premium black party frock with subtle floral highlights creating a luxurious boutique appeal and modern charm.

name: White Lilac Symphony Anarkali Suit
description: Soft white and lilac floral anarkali suit offering a feminine and elegant festive look. Perfect for traditional gatherings.

name: Emerald Daisy Charm Designer Gown
description: Nature inspired green floral designer gown set with refreshing colour tone and stylish festive presence.

name: Midnight Rose Glam Party Gown
description: Stylish black party gown enhanced with elegant rose motifs creating a glamorous evening statement outfit.

name: Pink Blossom Princess Festive Anarkali
description: Vibrant pink festive anarkali with colourful floral patterns and grand flare. Perfect for mehendi, haldi and joyful occasions.

name: Peony Wrap-Style Frock
description: Soft lilac plain elegant frock with flowy silhouette and minimal styling. Ideal for simple classy ethnic dressing.

name: Ocean Marble Fantasy Designer Gown
description: Unique ocean marble print designer gown featuring artistic texture and dreamy flare for a trendy boutique fashion look.
